name: Victor Arden
abstract: Victor Arden was the stage name of American pianist Lewis John Fuiks (8 March 1893 – 31 July 1962) who was best known as the piano duo partner of and co-orchestra leader with Phil Ohman from 1922 to 1932. He was the pianist in the All-Star Trio, who made several hits for Victor Records between 1919 and 1921.

about_quotes.speaker: Edwin "Squirrel" Ashcraft
about_quotes.evidence: I can remember trios. I can remember the all-star trio. That was with George Hamlin Green on xylophone, and Victor Arden, I think it was, on the piano.
